/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SoftwareRenderer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SoftwareRenderer.dir/src/canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftwareRenderer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftwareRenderer.dir/src/raytracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftwareRenderer.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SoftwareRenderer.dir/src/scene.cpp.o -o SoftwareRenderer  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib64 /usr/local/lib64/libSDL3.so.0.5.0
